## Checklist

- [ ] `zig build` passes
- [ ] New method follows the pattern: struct in `src/methods/`, wrapper in `bot.zig`, export in `methods.zig`
- [ ] Public declarations have `///` doc comments
- [ ] README updated if needed (new method, new option, etc.)
